violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
Inspector observed trash and debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The floors under retail shelves and freezer walk-in have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
